entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: Arachis hypogaea L., the primary crop studied for boiling characteristics

entities.name: COOKING TIME
entities.description: The duration required for groundnut seeds and pods to be cooked, denoted as CT

entities.name: POD SEED NUMBER
entities.description: The number of seeds per pod, with 3-4 seeds being preferred

entities.name: SEED SIZE
entities.description: The physical size of the groundnut seeds, with large seeds being preferred

entities.name: OIL CONTENT
entities.description: The amount of oil in the groundnut, with low oil content being preferred

entities.name: PROTEIN CONTENT
entities.description: The amount of protein in the groundnut, with high protein content being preferred

entities.name: TASTE
entities.description: The flavor profile of the groundnut, with sweet taste being preferred

entities.name: VALENCIA GROUNDNUT GERMPLASM
entities.description: Thirty-three lines of Valencia groundnut used for evaluation

entities.name: GROWING SEASON
entities.description: The time of year the crop was grown, specifically the 1995 rainy and 1995/96 post-rainy seasons

entities.name: ICRISAT CENTER PATANCHERU INDIA
entities.description: The research facility where the groundnut lines were grown and evaluated

entities.name: PHYSICOCHEMICAL TRAITS
entities.description: The physical and chemical characteristics of the groundnut seeds and pods

entities.name: PRE-SOAKING
entities.description: The process of soaking seeds and pods in water or brine before cooking

entities.name: BRINE SOAKING
entities.description: A pre-soaking treatment using a 1% brine solution

entities.name: UNTREATED
entities.description: Seeds and pods that were not subjected to pre-soaking

entities.name: FRESH-SEED BOILING
entities.description: The process of boiling freshly harvested groundnut seeds

entities.name: CURED-SEED BOILING
entities.description: The process of boiling cured groundnut seeds

entities.name: GENOTYPES
entities.description: Specific preferred lines identified for boiling uses, including ICGI 328, 1307, 2148, and 6224

entities.name: BREEDING PROGRAM
entities.description: A systematic approach to develop better boiling type groundnuts using selected genotypes
